# Literature {#sec-literature}

This chapter collects IPPL-related papers, software records, and presentation material used by the manual.

## Core publications

- The ALPINE/IPPL particle-in-cell mini-app paper studies scaling and performance portability for plasma applications on pre-exascale systems [@muralikrishnan2024scalingPicMiniapps].
- The free-space spectral Poisson solver paper presents performance-portable Hockney-Eastwood and Vico-Greengard solvers implemented in IPPL [@mayani2025freeSpacePoisson].

## Related records

- The arXiv preprint for the ALPINE/IPPL study is kept for historical context [@muralikrishnan2022alpineArxiv].
- The Zenodo software snapshot records the IPPL state used for the ACM TOMS Poisson solver paper [@ippl2025vicoGreengardSoftware].
- The 2026 HPSF presentation gives a current overview of IPPL as a Kokkos-based particle-mesh library [@adelmann2026ipplHpsfPresentation].

## ETH CSE theses and reports

The AMAS ETH CSE project archive includes several IPPL-relevant theses that are useful background for manual chapters and developer work:

- Conjugate-gradient and preconditioner work: early performance-portable CG development, matrix-free PCG preconditioners, and Landau damping scaling studies [@vinciguerra2021performancePortableCg; @bolliger2024matrixFreePreconditioner; @schreiner2024matrixFreePreconditioner].
- Poisson solver extensions: open-boundary FFT improvements, dual-space kernel splitting, Monte Carlo Poisson directions, and related performance-portable Poisson solver work [@montanaro2023openBoundaryFftPoisson; @ammann2024dualSpaceKernelSplitting; @schucan2025monteCarloPoisson; @mayani2021hosePoisson].
- Particle-mesh and load-balancing work: ORB load balancing, P3M, rank independence, and mixed execution spaces [@ligotino2021loadBalancingIppl; @schwab2025p3mAlgorithm; @vinciguerra2023rankIndependence].
- FEM and Maxwell-related building blocks: scalar FEM, Nedelec spaces, and higher-order finite elements [@buehler2023finiteElementBlocks; @pietak2025nedelecSpaceIppl; @hutter2026higherOrderFiniteElements].
- Application-level IPPL material includes cosmological structure formation with IPPL [@crazzolara2024cosmologicalStructureFormation].

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
